Operations.__comment: DEV ONLY. Staff-facing shared-secret auth, not the merchant HMAC scheme. Never expose this host publicly without real per-operator auth + RBAC.

Merchant.__comment: MUST match MerchantGateway's appsettings.Development.json exactly — a merchant created here has to authenticate against the same pepper/signing-key material there, same DB.

KeyManagement.__comment: MUST match MerchantGateway's appsettings.Development.json — same HD wallet, same xpub, so addresses this host derives are consistent with the ones MerchantGateway already derived from the shared NextDerivationIndex counter.
